name: Performance Monitor HUD shows load time and memory metrics
description: On the Preview tab, clicking the Activity (Performance Monitor) button shows a floating HUD with Load Time, Memory, Code Size, and Engine metrics.

planSteps.description: Click the 'المعاينة' (Preview) tab in the bottom dock
Click the button with title 'لوحة الأداء' in the preview toolbar
Verify the text 'Performance' is visible on the page
Verify the text 'Load Time' is visible on the page
Verify the text 'Memory' is visible on the page
Verify the text 'Code Size' is visible on the page
Verify the text 'Engine' is visible on the page
